name: Native Memory Citations
description: Search and fetch local OpenClaw memory with source citations and extractive cited answers.

workspace.description: Absolute path to the OpenClaw workspace. Defaults to $OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE or ~/.openclaw/workspace.

allowedRoots.description: Workspace-relative memory roots to search. Overrides the built-in default set.

sharedMode.description: When true, exclude the private MEMORY.md from the default root set.

maxFileBytes.description: Per-file size cap in bytes. Files larger than this are skipped. Default 1048576.

mode.description: Operating mode. bounded is default and preserves 2026.6.x behavior; enhanced enables explicitly configured pillars.

autoEnable.description: In enhanced mode, allow the dreaming guard to enable OpenClaw dreaming.

enforce.description: In enhanced mode, warn when dreaming-dependent features run without host dreaming.

blockToolsWhenOff.description: In enhanced mode, make dreaming-dependent tools fail hard when dreaming is off.

enabled.description: Enable the local zero-LLM graph sidecar tools. Default false.

maxDepth.description: Maximum traversal depth for native_memory_graph. Default 3.

semantic.description: Enhanced mode placeholder for host semantic recall fusion. Default false.

rerank.description: Enhanced mode placeholder for reranking fused candidates. Default false.

snapshotFirst.description: Enhanced mode placeholder for tier-0 snapshot recall. Default false.

intentClassifier.description: Enhanced mode placeholder for intent classification. Default false.

enabled.description: Enhanced mode placeholder for snapshot prompt injection. Default false.
Enhanced mode placeholder for observation tagging. Default false.

model.description: Model profile for observation extraction when enabled. Default haiku.

extraction.description: When false, observation tagging uses raw append fallback. Default true.

enabled.description: Enable optional memory-wiki bridge when present. Default false.
